[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A white cartoon-like outline of a lowercase “q” or similar character stands next to a small orange-and-white cat on a plain white background.

The main subject is a cutout-style orange and white cat standing upright beside a thick black line drawing of a character, with the cat facing forward and its head slightly tilted toward the center.

The setting appears to be a simple, blank white background with no visible room details, and the image is presented as a graphic or edited composition.

The cat has a light orange coat on its head and ears, white fur on its face and body, and brownish-orange patches on its head. It has large round eyes, a small pink nose, and visible whiskers. The cat’s body is upright with its front paws visible and its posture close to the black outline figure. The black outline figure is a stylized, thick line drawing with rounded shapes and small circular dots, with a curved bottom left and an arcing form that resembles a letter-like character. There is a faint watermark-like text near the bottom right that reads “@mieayambasoo,” and another small text line near the bottom center-left that reads “Dari komentar di TikTok.” The lighting is flat and even, consistent with a graphic on a white background.

Visible Text:
@mieayambasoo
Dari komentar di TikTok

Practical Summary:
The image shows a white-background graphic featuring an orange-and-white cat standing upright beside a thick black cartoon character outline. Additional small watermark text appears in the lower portion of the image.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

[No visible text in the screenshot.]

# Structured Version

- [No extractable text found.]

# Notes

- The watermark text appears to be “[unclear] @mieayambaso” but it is too small/blurred to read reliably, so it is not extracted.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
